modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Projector image is misaligned and extends beyond the smart board.

full_description_text: 
I was using the projector in the conference room, and the image is not straight. Part of the image is actually outside the smart board area, which makes it difficult to see. This misalignment is causing issues during presentations and needs to be fixed.
short_description: Projector image is misaligned and extends beyond the smart board.
description: I was using the projector in the conference room, and the image is not straight. Part of the image is actually outside the smart board area, which makes it difficult to see. This misalignment is causing issues during presentations and needs to be fixed.
